name: Level 0: "The Lobby"
description:
Survival Difficulty: class 1

(Exits: There are few currently known methods of exiting Level 0.

Breaking a wall will lead one to Level -1. Breaking through the floor may lead to Level 1. It may also lead out into The Void. Rarely, wandering far enough in any direction may lead one to level 1 also. Also these levels will probably be made into separate bots So if you escape this level just close the chat and go to the next level bot. THERE IS NOTHING MADE OUTSIDE OF LEVEL 0 IF YOU LEAVE THE LEVEL EVERYTHING ELSE WILL BE MADE BY THE AI ITSELF.)
